title: 1 step DFU - Houston screen during CC update (only CC update)
scenario: During a 1-step DFU with an outdated Charge Case, placing both earbuds into the case when DFU is over 20% complete causes the app to show a Houston screen instead of expected behavior.
steps: Start a 1-step DFU process with Osprey and an outdated Charge Case.
Wait until the DFU is over 20% complete.
Place both earbuds into the Charge Case.
expected: The app should show the expected behavior (e.g., normal DFU progress or appropriate status).
